channel.title: Bios on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Bios on Zymacs

item.title: About
item.description:
I am a Computer Engineering graduate. I like to learn about Computers and make them do things.
I like Maths and Finance too. On here, I share mostly technical knowledge from topics I’ve studied and every once in a while, opinionated rumblings on all sorts of topics that interest me. Probably you as well. To talk about anything related to what I post on here or whatever else, please don’t hesitate to reach out to me via email at zymacs@zmail.com or via BlueSky. Just in case you are looking for it, here is a link to my CV. I am currently open to Junior Software Engineering jobs and would use a ref. Thanks.

item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description:
Whoami

I Computer Engineering graduate from Eastern Mediterranean University in Cyprus. My training strength is currently on the scripting side of Software Development. For how long I have been using the terminal, I would pick up on fast on DevOps/Backend development topics as they are used at any software company. I do have enough theoretical grounding that allows me to adapt quickly in new environments. I enjoy working on interesting technical software problems solutions. Especially if the solutions impact people's lives. I am also committed to long life learning and treat programming both as a form of creation and as a profession.
